Sep 11th

Community

Misc

  • Flutter Events - Open list of Flutter events by @hillelcoren.

    • Dec 11th, 2021

    Articles

    Tutorial

  • Todo Liststars282 [259⭐] – Step by step tutorial how to build Todo List with Flutter by Andrei Lesnitsky

    • Articles

    Beginner

  • Roadmap to Flutter Developmentstars4.1k [2795⭐] - Visual roadmap with principles, patterns, and frameworks for Flutter newbies by Olexandr Leuschenko.
  • Beginner's Guidestars220 [123⭐] - Comprehensive guide to the basics of Flutter and Firebase by Anthony.

    • Articles

    Advanced

  • Rendering Pipeline [799👍] and Let's build a render tree - Engine architecture by Adam Barth.

    • Videos

  • Mtechviral [245🎬] - [Hindi/English] Mtechviral Series By Pawan Kumar.

    • Components

    Demonstrations

  • Flutter Examplesstars6.2k [5861⭐] - Simple basic isolated apps for devs by Nishant Srivastava.
  • Flutter Catalogstars1.8k [1601⭐] - showcasing Flutter components, with side-by-side source code view, by X-Wei.
  • Generative Artstars438 [401⭐] - Generative Art by Robert Felker.

    • Components

    UI

  • StaggeredGridViewstars2.7k [2292⭐] - GridView with tiles of variable sizes by Romain Rastel.
  • Radial Menustars426 [401⭐] - Animated Radial Menu by Victor Choueiri.
  • Tinder Cardsstars700 [646⭐] - Tinder like cards swipe effect by Ivascu Adrian.
  • Flip Panelstars530 [461⭐] - Flip panel with built-in animation by HungHD.
  • Facebook Reactionsstars300 [261⭐] - Facebook reactions widget by Duy Tran.
  • Flushbarstars881 [818⭐] - Highly configurable Snackbar by Andre Haueisen.
  • Stepper Touchstars261 [238⭐] - Lateral value stepper nicely animated by Raouf Rahiche.
  • Typeaheadstars642 [560⭐] - Display overlay suggestions to users as they type by Abdul Rahman Al Hamali.
  • Pin Codestars295 [252⭐] - Animated & customisable Pin code for login and OTP by Liew Jun Tung.
  • Folding Cellstars503 [430⭐] - Fold your widget by Faob.
  • Liquid Pull To Refreshstars1k [922⭐] - A beautiful and custom refresh indicator by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Before Afterstars716 [580⭐] - Beautiful slider which makes it easier to display the difference between two images, by Sahil Kumar.
  • Scratcherstars384 [306⭐] - Scratch card widget which temporarily hides content from user, by Kamil Rykowski.
  • Image Sequence Animatorstars129 [104⭐] - A simple widget for animating a set of images with full custom controls as an alternative to using a GIF file by Ali Yigit Bireroglu.
  • Beautiful_Popupstars546 [452⭐] - Beautify your app popup by jaweii.
  • Credit Card Formstars403 [317⭐] - Animated credit card input form Origogi.
  • Flutter Tagsstars402 [332⭐] - Tags with different customizations by Di Natale Antonino.
  • Flutter Neumorphicstars1.6k [1329⭐] - Ready to use Neumorphic kit for Flutter with 🕶️ dark mode.
  • Doughstars517 [388⭐] - Widgets for a squishy user interface by Josiah Saunders.
  • Card Settingsstars430 [356⭐] - package for building settings forms by codegrue.
  • Timelinesstars543 [413⭐] - Powerful & Easy to use timeline package by Chulwoo Park.
  • Timeline Tilestars528 [446⭐] - A tile to help build beautiful and customisable timelines by Julio Bitencourt.
  • Rounded Loading Buttonstars204 [127⭐] - Button with a loading indicator, complete with success and error animations by Chris Edgington.
  • PlutoGridstars388 [182⭐] - Web and desktop datagrid that can be controlled by the keyboard by bosskmk.

    • Components

    Sticky Headers

  • Sticky Headerstars753 [666⭐] - Sliver based sticky headers by Romain Rastel.
  • Sticky Headersstars875 [731⭐] - Configurable sticky headers by Simon Lightfoot.

    Drawers

  • Hidden Drawer Menustars286 [231⭐] - Beautiful drawer mode menu feature with perspective animations by Rafael Almeida Barbosa.

  • Fancy Bottom Navigationstars608 [545⭐] - Animated bottom navigation by Tony Owen.

  • Titled Navigation Barstars322 [291⭐] - Animated bottom navigation bar that switch between icon and title by Pedro Massango.
  • Google Nav Barstars520 [409⭐] - A modern google style nav bar for flutter by Sooxt98.

  • Rubber Bottom Sheetstars472 [418⭐] - Elastic material bottom sheet by Mattia Crovero.

    Sliders

  • RangeSliderstars353 [318⭐] - 2-thumb configurable RangeSlider by Didier Boelens.

    Calendar

  • Carousel Sliderstars1.4k [1178⭐] - Carousel slider widget, support infinite scroll and custom child widget by serenader.

    Navigation

  • Flurostars3.5k [3362⭐] - The brightest, hippest, coolest router for Flutter with Navigation, wildcard, query, transitions by Posse.
  • PageView Indicatorstars158 [132⭐] - Build page indicators for the PageView by Leo Cavalcante.
  • Getstars7.6k [5499⭐] - Navigate between screens & display snackbars/dialogs/bottomSheets without context by Jonny Borges.
  • Beamerstars458 [290⭐] - Route through guarded page stacks and URLs using the Navigator 2.0 API effortlessly by Sandro Lovnički.

  • Loginstars668 [628⭐] - FaceID, TouchID, and Fingerprint Reader by Rody Davis.

  • Parsed Textstars210 [190⭐] - Interactive text based on content recognition, also supports Regex by Fayeed Pawaskar.
